steps.prompt: Words always go from left to right — first letter on the left, last letter on the right! Build bus — start on the left!
steps.feedback: b-u-s — b then u then s — left to right. Now build cow!
c first on the left, w last on the right. Now build bull!
b-u-l-l — always left to right. Now build lion!
l-i-o-n from left to right. Last one — build horse!
h-o-r-s-e — left to right, every time. That's how every word is written!
